checklist 0.1.7
  • NEWS

Reference

Checking packages

check_codemeta()

Check the package metadata

check_cran()

Run the package checks required by CRAN

check_description()

Check the DESCRIPTION file

check_documentation()

Check the documentation

check_license()

Check the license

check_package()

A standardised test for R packages

set_tag()

Set a New Tag and Create a Release

tidy_desc()

Make your description tidy

Checking scripts

check_source()

Standardised test for an R source repository

Checking packages or scripts

check_filename()

Check the style of file names

check_lintr()

Check the packages for linters

read_checklist()

Read the check list file from a package

write_checklist()

Write a check list with allowed issues in the source code

Setting up a project

create_package()

Create an R package according to INBO requirements

setup_package()

Add or update the checklist infrastructure to an existing package

R6 class

checklist

The checklist R6 class

Auxiliary functions

is_workdir_clean()

Check if the current workdir of a repo is clean

orcid2person()

Convert an ORCID to a person object.

validate_email()

Check if a vector contains valid email

yesno()

A function that asks a yes or no question to the user
